series_metadata.series_description: Including, but not limited to: documents pertaining to application forms, personnel actions, benefit forms, training records (including home inspections and firearms training), workforce development, tuition reimbursement, other education assistance program records and copies or originals of other documents concerning the employee (excluding medical records), equipment inventory, state vehicle information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 7 years after employee separation, Paper: Shred
